texto: The advantages of a losing team: (i) There is everything to hope for and nothing to fear (2.) Defeats do not disturb one's sleep. (3) An occasional victory is a surprise and a delight. (4) There is no danger of any club passing you. (5) You are not asked fifty times a day "What was the score?" people take it for granted that you lost.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Elmer E. Bates que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “The advantages of a losing team: (i) There is everything to hope for and nothing to fear (2.) Def…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, forgiveness, there, com foco em reflexao.
